collections.name: Nepali Legal Framework
collections.description: Foundational Nepali legal documents relevant to corruption and accountability cases. Includes the Prevention of Corruption Act, CIAA Act, Special Court Act, and related regulations.

collections.name: Jawafdehi Case Archive
collections.description: Published Jawafdehi corruption case summaries. Auto-exported from Jawafdehi API and updated weekly. Includes case numbers, entities, allegations, verdicts, and timelines.

collections.name: Caseworker Guides
collections.description: Operational guides for Jawafdehi caseworkers covering corruption pattern identification, CIAA filing procedures, evidence collection, source documentation, and common pitfalls.

collections.name: NGM Court Reference
collections.description: Reference documentation for Nepal's court system including hierarchy, jurisdictions, court identifier codes, case type codes, and hearing/decision types.
